name: browser-automation-workbench
description: A local-first browser automation workbench built on CDP, with an execution engine and an intelligence layer for recording, reviewing, and extracting browsing workflows.

scripts.check: npm run check:engine && npm run check:intelligence
scripts.check:engine: node --check packages/browser-engine/accessibility.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/autoshot.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/batch.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/be.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/core.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/detect.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/dialog.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/frames.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/interact.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/navigation.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/network.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/page.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/pipeline.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/profiles.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/server.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/start.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/stealth.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/tabs.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/tasks.mjs && node --check packages/browser-engine/wait.mjs
